title: Well-formed event-driven design — acks=all, idempotent consumer, DLQ, schema evolution
expected_feedback: No violations. Correctly implements production-grade Kafka event design: (1) acks=all + idempotent producer prevents data loss and duplicate writes, (2) manual commit + idempotent DB operations handle at-least-once delivery, (3) DLQ after 3 retries prevents poison message blocking, (4) Avro with BACKWARD_TRANSITIVE compatibility in Schema Registry, (5) partition key=order_id for per-order ordering, (6) RF=3 with min.insync.replicas=2, (7) consumer lag monitoring with alert threshold.
